title: Moby Thesaurus List
summaries: "Moby Thesaurus List by Grady Ward" is a comprehensive thesaurus published in the early 21st century. This reference book serves as a valuable resource for writers, students, and anyone in need of an extensive collection of synonyms and related terms in the English language. It includes a significant number of words and is designed to aid in improving vocabulary and enhancing language skills.  The main content of "Moby Thesaurus List" features an extensive compilation of over 30,000 root words along with more than 2.5 million synonyms and related terms. The thesaurus is presented in a simple ASCII format, making it easily accessible for editing and parsing, though users are encouraged to reformat it for more effective use. Additionally, it includes a smaller thesaurus based on Roget's work that demonstrates a more organized structure for managing synonyms. With this thesaurus, users can improve their writing by finding the most suitable words for their needs, thereby enriching their expression and communication. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
